Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, summon 1 Blood Bat minion (d10) within 8 spaces, then choose 1:
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Beckon & Bite.description: Move a Beguiled creature adjacent to you and bite them: 2d10+30 damage and 1 Wound.
Beckon & Bite.name: Beckon & Bite

Beguile.description:
If no creature is Beguiled, Beguile a target on a failed DC 18 WIL save (w/ disadvantage if Bloodied).

Beguiled. Dazed. Cannot Defend or allow anyone to Interpose for you. Damage ends.
Beguile.name: Beguile

Blood Bat.description: After each hero's turn, summon 1 blood bat minion (d10) within 8 spaces, then choose 1 action
Blood Bat.name: Blood Bat

Bloodied.description: At 160 HP, gain Mistform. Not vulnerable to radiant. Bat Decoy. Whenever Alaric would take damage, instead first swap places with a bat minion, 1/round.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Ebonfang.description: Deal 1d10+15 damage, your target is considered Bloodied for 1 round. Fly 8 before or after attacking.
Ebonfang.name: Ebonfang

Last Stand.description: Alaric is dying! 160 more damage and he dies. Until then, his Sanguine Cloak, attacks, and bats roll d20s instead of d10s.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Sanguine Cloak.description: (1/turn) Deal [[/r 1d10]] necrotic damage whenever you are hit, the attack is reduced by this amount.
Sanguine Cloak.name: Sanguine Cloak

Sunscorn.description: Vulnerable to radiant. After taking radiant damage, use Beguile as a Reaction, they roll with disadvantage.
Sunscorn.name: Sunscorn

Bloodied.description: At 160 HP, Azriel can use Crackling Whip twice each turn.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Crackling Whip..description: Move 6. (Reach 6) 3d12 damage. On hit: Grappled and pulled adjacent to Azriel (escape DC 17 STR, DEX, or until he uses the whip again).
Crackling Whip..name: Crackling Whip.

Doom Sword..description: 3d12+10 fire damage to all creatures within Reach 2.
Doom Sword..name: Doom Sword.

Last Stand.description: YES, MORE PAIN! Azriel is dying! 180 more damage and he dies. Until then, EVERY hit against him is a crit.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

PAIN!.description: Crits against Azriel are Vicious, he deals damage equal to the crit dice back to the attacker.
PAIN!.name: PAIN!

Almighty Push & Pull.description: (Range 12) DC 20 STR save or be launched 20 ft. into the air, repeat until the target saves. Fall damage for this attack is 1d20 for every 10 ft. fallen.
Almighty Push & Pull.name: Almighty Push & Pull

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, choose 1 not yet chosen (reset when all have been chosen):
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: At 310 HP, Gravitational Mastery. Move ALL objects and creatures within 16 spaces anywhere else within the area. Gravitational Lensing. The hero with the most HP is marked by Caerys. She takes half damage from all sources, her mark takes the other half. This lasts until the mark drops to 0 HP.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Glimpse Your End.description: DC 20 WIL save or DOOMED: Concentration ends, the next damage roll against you is maximized.
Glimpse Your End.name: Glimpse Your End

Immensity.description: (Reach 12) DC 20 STR save (disadvantage if within Reach 4) or suffer 3d20 damage and Prone. Half on save.
Immensity.name: Immensity

Last Stand.description: Use Gravitational Mastery, then Caerys is dying! 200 more damage and she dies. Until then she chooses twice each turn. If still alive after 1 round: Reset Time: she resets back to full HP.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Plasma Storm.description: Reach 6, DC 20 DEX save or 2d20 lightning and 2d20 fire damage. Half on save.
Plasma Storm.name: Plasma Storm

Ravages of Time.description: At the beginning of each round, all heroes suffer 1 Wound
Ravages of Time.name: Ravages of Time

Slipstream.description: 3/encounter when she would suffer any negative effect she can swap places with a creature of her choice making them the target instead. All heroes recover 1 Wound.
Slipstream.name: Slipstream

Wormhole.description: Teleport 12. 3d20 to a creature adjacent to where you began or ended.
Wormhole.name: Wormhole

1. Warping Ray.description: 3d6. On hit: Dazed, exchange places with target.
1. Warping Ray.name: 1. Warping Ray

3. Terror Ray.description:
5d10 psychic damage & Terrified:

(You are Frightened, and your screams give allies within 6 disadvantage on rolls. Ends when Dravok's plans are FLAWED.)
3. Terror Ray.name: 3. Terror Ray

4. Gravitation Ray.description: 2d6 damage. Push that many spaces. Knocked Prone on 7+.
4. Gravitation Ray.name: 4. Gravitation Ray

5. Charm Ray.description: DC 16 WIL save or you spend 3 Actions attacking with or moving them, 2 actions on save. (Cannot spend resources, they regain spent actions afterward.)
5. Charm Ray.name: 5. Charm Ray

6. Death Ray.description: DC 16 STR save or drop to 0 HP. On save, gain 1 Wound. If a Dying creature fails this, they die.
6. Death Ray.name: 6. Death Ray

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, Move 6 and then either use Eye Ray (Range 10, [[/r 1d6]]{randomly chosen ray} then choose target) OR Terrible Maw.
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: At 110 HP, use Petrification Ray against every enemy. His save DC increases to 18
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Dravok is dying! 70 more damage and he dies. Until then, each turn he will move or use Warping Ray and then Devastation Beam. [[/r 2d12+20]] in a 10 space long, 2 space wide line.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

My plans, flawless!.description: Dravok makes all saves with +1 Advantage, attacks against him have Disadvantage.
My plans, flawless!.name: My plans, flawless!

Terrible Maw.description: Melee attack. 4d4, EVERY die can crit and is Vicious
Terrible Maw.name: Terrible Maw

Weakness.description: Taking more than 12 piercing or slashing damage: Dravok's plans are FLAWED! (until the end of the next hero's turn.)
Weakness.name: Weakness

Attack Sequence.description:
After each hero's turn, choose 1:

Opening Attack: Heh, I didn't even like Malphara, but blood runs thicker than mud!
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: No fair, I deserve my turn!
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Claw (2x)..description:
1d4+8. On damage: Dazed. On crit: DC 12 INT save or 1 Wound.

Gaining the Upper Hand: Sing, little toads, silling!
Claw (2x)..name: Claw (2x).

Last Stand.description:
Your future is dark, worm... *occult mum-bling*

Whoever landed the killing blow: WIL save or become cursed; half as tall until cured.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Spit Curse..description:
When Dregatha crits: DC 12 INT save or suffer 1 Wound.

On Crit: He-he-he! Squirrm like a maggot!
Spit Curse..name: Spit Curse.

Aura of Wind..description: Ranged attacks against you have disadvantage. End of turn: push adjacent creatures 2 spaces away.
Aura of Wind..name: Aura of Wind.

Bloodied.description: At 100 HP, enemies within Reach 12 gain Thornblight, and Petal Storm recharges, .
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Florindris is dying! 70 more damage and she dies. Until then, Aura of Wind and Gust move creatures twice as far.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Petal Storm. (1 use).description: 3d10+10 damage to all enemies within Reach 8, half on a DC 13 DEX save.
Petal Storm. (1 use).name: Petal Storm. (1 use)

Rend..description: Fly 10 before or after attacking. (Reach 2) 1d10+10 damage to up to 2 targets within reach. On hit: Gain Thornblight.
Rend..name: Rend.

Wither.description: Resistant to necrotic damage, but it suppresses Aura of Wind for 1 turn.
Wither.name: Wither

Bloodied.description: At 87 HP, on his next turn, he uses Molten Fury a number of times equal to half the number of heroes (rounded up).
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Cinder Armor..description: Immune to fire. When damaged, deal 5 fire damage to all adjacent creatures.
Cinder Armor..name: Cinder Armor.

Extinguish Flame..description: Cold or radiant crits extinguish all areas ignited by Molten Fury and suppress Cinder Armor for 1 turn.
Extinguish Flame..name: Extinguish Flame.

Inferno Cleave..description: Move 8 then strike a 2??2 square area for 2d10+10 fire damage.
Inferno Cleave..name: Inferno Cleave.

Last Stand.description: Flameheart is dying! 80 more damage and he dies. Until then, the area of his attacks increase to a 3??3 square.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Molten Fury..description: Lob a molten fireball at the furthest hero not already in the flames, igniting a 2??2 square area. Creatures there take 2d10+10 damage; and another 10 damage at the end of each of their turns if they remain in the area.
Molten Fury..name: Molten Fury.

Aura of Rot.description: Creatures within 6 spaces take 5 necrotic damage at the end of their turns.
Aura of Rot.name: Aura of Rot

Bite.description:
(Reach 2) Move 6, then 3d10. On damage: Cruelty's Gift.

(Cruelty's Gift: Healing is halved and Vulnerable to necrotic damage. Healing ends.)
Bite.name: Bite

Bloodied.description: At 160 HP Gloomwing's Rot Breath recharges.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Gloomwing is dying! 150 more damage and he dies. Until then, the damage and range of His Aura of Rot is doubled.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Light Sensitivity.description: Radiant damage suppresses Aura of Rot until the end of the next hero's turn.
Light Sensitivity.name: Light Sensitivity

Rot Breath (1 use).description: Fly 10, then (Cone 8) DC 17 DEX save or 8d10 necrotic, half on save.
Rot Breath (1 use).name: Rot Breath (1 use)

Tail.description: (Reach 4) 1d10, and knocked back that many spaces.
Tail.name: Tail

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, move 6 and then choose one:
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: At 50 HP, Greenthumb gains magical bark, giving himself Heavy Armor.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Greenthumb is dying! 30 more damage and he dies. Until then, he chooses twice each turn.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Root..description: Choose half of the heroes to make a DC 11 DEX save or take 2d4 piercing damage and be Restrained by thorny vines (escape DC 11 STR or DEX save, or any slashing or fire damage).
Root..name: Root.

Bloodied.description: At 50 HP, Savage Screech recharges.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Brutal..description: Treat the highest die rolled as the Primary Die. On crit: knock Prone.
Brutal..name: Brutal.

Last Stand.description: Grimbeak is dying! 30 more damage and she dies. Until then, her Attacks use d10s instead of d6s.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Savage Screech. (1 use).description: All enemies within reach 12 suffer 2d6 damage (ignoring armor). DC 11 WIL save or become Frightened for 1 round.
Savage Screech. (1 use).name: Savage Screech. (1 use)

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, choose Kelebek OR Poppy to act.
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: When Kelebek is reduced to 30 HP, Poppy always Interposes for him.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: When Poppy dies, the room is filled with noxious gas: all heroes have a maximum of 2 actions each turn.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Vinelash..description: Move 6, then 2d6. On damage: move target to an unoccupied space within 10 spaces.
Vinelash..name: Vinelash.

Bloodied.description: At 35 HP, Krogg's damage increases to 2d8+3.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Crack Skulls..description: Move 6. Swing a Grappled creature at another creature. Both take 2d6+3 damage, ending the Grapple.
Crack Skulls..name: Crack Skulls.

Last Stand.description: Krogg is dying! If he takes 20 more damage he dies. Until then, he has Heavy armor.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Constrict..description: Move up to 8, attack for 1d6+10. On damage: Grappled (escape DC 10).
Constrict..name: Constrict.

Desperate Purge..description: When crit, Grappled, or Bloodied: regurgitates its most recent meal.
Desperate Purge..name: Desperate Purge.

Squeeze & Spit Acid..description: Squeeze a Grappled creature for 1d6+10 damage. Move up to 4, then attack for 1d6+10 (range 8). On crit: Poisoned until healed.
Squeeze & Spit Acid..name: Squeeze & Spit Acid.

Bloodied.description: At 90 HP, her Wing Buffet Range and DC increase by 2.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Nalzar is dying! 60 more damage and she dies. Until then, each turn, she moves 6, then uses Devour (ignoring the Prone requirement).
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Tail Swipe..description: When dealt slashing or lightning damage: knock a hero within 3 spaces Prone.
Tail Swipe..name: Tail Swipe.

Torn Wings..description: Each slashing crit reduces the Wing Buffet DC by 1.
Torn Wings..name: Torn Wings.

Wing Buffet..description: Fly 8, then land. Cone 8: 1d12, then DC 14 STR save or also knocked Prone (advantage if behind cover or another hero).
Wing Buffet..name: Wing Buffet.

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, choose Kelebek OR Poppy to act.
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: When Kelebek is reduced to 30 HP, Poppy always Interposes for him
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: When Poppy dies, the room is filled with noxious gas: all heroes have a maximum of 2 actions each turn.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Stink Cloud..description: When damaged, enemies within 2 spaces make a STR save (DC equal to the higher of 10 or the damage done). On a failure, they must spend their next action vomiting, and they cannot take reactions this round.
Stink Cloud..name: Stink Cloud.

Bloodied.description: At 37 HP, Pudge's damage increases to 1d12+2.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Grab & Throw..description: 1d8+2, on damage: they are thrown at another hero within 6 spaces. Both make a DC 12 DEX save or take 1d8+2 damage and are knocked Prone, half damage on save.
Grab & Throw..name: Grab & Throw.

Last Stand.description: Pudge is dying! 20 more damage and he dies. Until then, Pudge can move 6 spaces, and use Grab & Throw each turn.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Bloodied.description: "Avenge Your Queen, My Brood!" At 80 HP, summon 3 spiderling minions/hero anywhere within Reach 8.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Dinner Time!.description: Command all of your spiderling minions to move up to 6 spaces and attack once each.
Dinner Time!.name: Dinner Time!

Hatch Brood..description: Summon spiderling minions (1/hero, size:d8); they act only when commanded.
Hatch Brood..name: Hatch Brood.

Impale..description: (Reach 2) 2d8+8 damage. Then skitter away up to 8 spaces.
Impale..name: Impale.

Last Stand.description: Aranya is dying! 40 more damage and she dies. Until then, Hatch Brood after each of her turns.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Weave Web..description:
Creatures she hits are entangled in a sticky web (Dazed).

Flammable Webs. Fire critical hits suppress the Broodmother's Weave Web for 1 turn.
Weave Web..name: Weave Web.

Bloodied.description: At 65 HP, his Venomous Stinger recharges.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Feral Instinct..description: Whenever Ravager is crit, he can fly 10.
Feral Instinct..name: Feral Instinct.

Last Stand.description: The Ravager is dying! 40 more damage and he dies. Until then, the first time each turn he takes damage, he uses Claw.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, move 6 then choose 1:
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: At 58 HP, she drips acid blood, dealing 1d6 damage to any creature she walks over.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Trampling Movement..description: She can move through the space of any creature smaller than her, knocking them Prone.
Trampling Movement..name: Trampling Movement.

Venom Stinger..description: (Reach 3, a creature she has advantage against) 1d6+20.
Venom Stinger..name: Venom Stinger.

Vulnerable Underbelly..description: Hits from Prone melee attackers auto crit on her.
Vulnerable Underbelly..name: Vulnerable Underbelly.

Bloodied.description: Smoke Bomb. At 62 HP, Thorn immediately becomes invisible (until the end of his next turn), then moves 8, ignoring opportunity attacks.
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Last Stand.description: Mortal Panic! Thorn is dying! 30 more damage and he's dead! Until then he'll Strike Back EVERY time he's hit (1/turn).
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Strike Back..description: When crit, make a Heart Piercer or Stormquill attack in return.
Strike Back..name: Strike Back.

Beckoning Doom..description: The 2 furthest heroes make a DC 16 STR save or are moved adjacent to Titan.
Beckoning Doom..name: Beckoning Doom.

Crushing Stomp..description: Move up to 10 spaces. Deal 1d4+20 damage to up to 2 targets along the path. On hit: Prone.
Crushing Stomp..name: Crushing Stomp.

Last Stand.description: Shattered Legion. At 0 HP Titan collapses into 4 skeleton minions/hero (d10 sized). If any remain, they reassemble into the Titan the next evening.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Splintering Legions..description: Bludgeoning damage or any crit cause bones to splinter off and animate, forming a d10 minion.
Splintering Legions..name: Splintering Legions.

Bloodied.description: At 150 HP gain Illusory Shift. Reaction, when attacked (1 use): Swap places with a Dominated creature, making them the new target of the attack
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Consume..description: (Dominated creature) Contested DEX or STR check, on success: Grappled and 6d12. Cannot be Defended or Interposed against.
Consume..name: Consume.

Control..description: Teleport 8. (Reach 8) DC 15 WIL save, force an enemy to spend one Action to make a weapon attack or cast a cantrip. On save, they attack with disadvantage.
Control..name: Control.

Dominate..description: (If no creatures are Dominated) Choose half of the heroes to suffer 2d12 psychic damage (ignoring armor). DC 15 WIL save or Dominated as well.
Dominate..name: Dominate.

Dominated.description: Rolls are made with disadvantage while Dominated. Ul' spend your first action on each of your turns, moving, making a weapon attack, or casting a cantrip. Damage ends.
Dominated.name: Dominated

Last Stand.description: Ul' is dying! 110 more damage and he dies. Until then, Dominated no longer ends on taking damage. Every hero makes a WIL save or become Dominated.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Mind Shield..description: Whenever Ul' would fail a save or take more than 30 damage while he has a creature Dominated, he may avoid the attack instead, but all Dominated creatures come to their senses.
Mind Shield..name: Mind Shield.

Attack Sequence.description: After each hero's turn, Bane attacks for [[/r 1d12+6]] then Vael chooses one:
Attack Sequence.name: Attack Sequence

Bloodied.description: At 125 HP, Vael gains the reaction Shield of Cruelty. (1 time use) If Vael would be damaged, instead he may reflect that much radiant damage back at the attacker
Bloodied.name: Bloodied

Cruelty's Edge..description: 1d4+2. On hit: DC 14 WIL save or Dazed and Frightened. Then move 6.
Cruelty's Edge..name: Cruelty's Edge.

DOOM..description: (Range 12, undamaged target) DC 14 WIL save or 5d12 damage. Half on save.
DOOM..name: DOOM.

Last Stand.description: Vael is dying! 90 more damage and he dies. Until then, he gains Heavy Armor, the hero that most recently damaged him is reduced to 0 HP, and Bane is sacrificed into a Vengeful Spirit. It deals 1d12+6 necrotic damage to creatures within reach 3 at the end of each of his turns.
Last Stand.name: Last Stand

Protect Master!.description: Whenever Vael would fail a save or take 20 or more damage, he may sacrifice his Lifebinding Spirit, Bane, instead. He spends his next turn moving up to 6 spaces and summoning Bane.
Protect Master!.name: Protect Master!

Veilwalker's Rebuke..description: (Range 8) 2d12+6. Double damage against those behind cover. 1/round you may swap places with them.
Veilwalker's Rebuke..name: Veilwalker's Rebuke.
